He guards villages, scattering the small demons that bring sickness and disorder. Rangda is the queen of demons, an old woman with long tongue, fangs, and a hanging belly, the mother of witches.

In the great masked dance of Calon Arang, Rangda comes out into the temple yard and casts spells on the villagers, sending sickness through the community. The men of the village seize their krises and run at her to kill her. Rangda turns her power against them, and they begin to drive their own krises into their own chests in a trance, helpless to stop.

Barong then enters the yard and stands between the dancers and Rangda. The spell breaks; the krises will not pierce the men's bodies. Neither side wins; Barong and Rangda fight on without a final victor, because the balance of the world rests on both of them continuing to exist. The dance ends, and the village understands again that good is not the absence of evil but its continuing opposite.
zh: 巴厘岛传统中，世界在两股大力之间永远拉扯。「巴龙」是众善灵之王，外形像一头长着浓密鬃毛、目光温柔的狮形神兽，演出时由两位舞者钻在身体里操纵。他护佑村庄，把带来疾病与失序的小妖驱散。「兰达」则是众魔之后——一位年老的女子，长舌、獠牙、肚腹下垂，是众女巫的母亲。
在著名的卡龙阿朗面具舞中，兰达走进神庙院中，对村民下咒，将病疫播散到全村。村中男子拔出克里斯短剑冲上前去要杀死她。兰达把法术回扣到他们身上——他们竟开始把自己的克里斯短剑刺向自家胸口，整个人陷入恍惚，怎么也停不下来。
这时巴龙踏入院中，立于舞者与兰达之间。咒法当场散去，克里斯短剑刺不进肉体。两方并未分出胜负；巴龙与兰达继续厮杀下去，谁也没有最终胜出——因为这个世界的平衡，正在于两者都必须继续存在。舞落幕时，全村又一次明白：所谓「善」，并不是「恶」的消失，而是与之相对的那一面始终在。

en: In Khmer and Thai tradition, the bright sea goddess Manimekhala held a magical crystal ball whose light could outshine the sun. She lived in the sky and on the waters and was honored as the protector of sailors. Wherever her crystal shone, a path of safety opened across the ocean. The asura Ramasura, a giant of the air, owned a great axe and was furious that no one paid attention to him.

Ramasura demanded that Manimekhala give him her shining ball. She refused and laughed at his envy. He hurled his axe at her. She threw her crystal to one side, and its light flashed across the whole sky.

The flash of the crystal is lightning, the people say, and the noise of the axe striking the air is thunder. From then on, every time the storm comes during the rainy season, Manimekhala and Ramasura have started again. In Khmer ceremonies and in the Thai dance called Mekhala-Ramasura, the two appear in front of an audience and act out the eternal quarrel that fills the wet-season sky.
zh: 高棉与泰国传统中，明亮的海洋女神摩尼梅卡拉手里捧着一颗能盖过太阳的魔法水晶宝珠。她出没于天空和海上，被尊为水手的守护神。她的宝珠所照之处，茫茫海面上便开出一条安全的航路。空中阿修罗罗摩苏罗持着一柄巨斧，恼怒于无人在意自己。
罗摩苏罗向摩尼梅卡拉发难，硬要她把那颗发光的宝珠交出来。她不肯，反笑话他眼红。罗摩苏罗举起巨斧朝她掷去，她则把宝珠朝一旁一抛，珠光顿时在天空中闪过。
民间说，那道宝珠之光就是闪电，那柄斧子劈在空气中的轰响就是雷声。从此以后，每到雨季暴风雨袭来，便是摩尼梅卡拉与罗摩苏罗又较上劲了。在柬埔寨的祭礼仪式中，以及在泰国称为「梅卡拉—罗摩苏罗」的舞蹈中，两人都被请到观众面前，一遍遍上演那场充满雨季天空的永恒之争。

en: Hang Tuah was a great laksamana, or admiral, of the Sultanate of Malacca in the fifteenth century. Born to humble parents, he came to court with four sworn brothers: Hang Jebat, Hang Kasturi, Hang Lekir, and Hang Lekiu. Together they served Sultan Mansur Shah, and Hang Tuah rose by his loyalty and his skill with the kris to become the sultan's most trusted officer.

Court rivals envied Hang Tuah and finally turned the sultan against him with a false accusation. The sultan ordered him executed. But the bendahara, the chief minister, secretly spared his life and hid him away. When the court learned that Hang Tuah had supposedly been killed, his brother Hang Jebat broke out in rage and took over the palace, killing courtiers and demanding justice for his friend.

The bendahara then revealed to the sultan that Hang Tuah was alive. The sultan recalled him and ordered him, terribly, to put down his own brother. Hang Tuah went into the palace and fought Hang Jebat for many days. In the end he killed him, weeping. Loyalty to his ruler had been heavier in his hands than loyalty to his closest friend, and the choice he made was kept in Malay memory as the hardest test of what loyalty might cost.
zh: 汉都亚是十五世纪马六甲苏丹国的一位大「拉克沙马纳」（海军大将）。他出身寒微，与四位结义兄弟——汉惹拔、汉卡斯都里、汉勒基尔、汉勒基乌——一同投身宫廷。五人皆事苏丹满速沙，汉都亚凭忠诚和高超的克里斯短剑技艺，逐渐成为苏丹最为倚重的近臣。
宫中权贵对他妒火中烧，终于用一桩诬告煽动苏丹反对他。苏丹下令将他处死。可是宰相（本达哈拉）暗中保下他的性命，把他藏到了远处。当朝中传出汉都亚已被处决的消息后，他的结义兄弟汉惹拔愤而起兵，攻占王宫，把诸臣斩杀，誓要为友讨回公道。
宰相这时才向苏丹禀明：汉都亚仍然活着。苏丹紧急将他召回，又下了一道至狠之命——让他亲手平定自己的兄弟。汉都亚走进王宫，与汉惹拔鏖战多日。最后他流着泪杀死了挚友。对君主之忠，在他手中胜过了对挚友之义，他做出的这一抉择，被马来人记作历史上最难承受的一道「忠义之试」。
